text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm heading to my office with Ines Fujin, when...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's been bugging me since this morning.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I've got work today—I hope this doesn't affect my
customer service...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey-hey, could you pretend to be a customer for
a second?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Welcome! What would you like to eat?
choice_data_list: A super-spicy bowl with extra, extra garlic.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, ahaha! I'm working at a fast food place
today, not the ramen shop!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Ah! Laughing makes my headache throb even
harder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin continues to suffer from her headache
for some time.
